name: Artifact Builder
description: AI-powered HTML component generator with live preview. Describe a component, chart, or UI element and watch it stream into existence.
author: contex

actions.name: generate
actions.description: PREFERRED: Send a prompt to the artifact builder's AI which streams HTML in real-time with live preview. Use this for all content creation requests. Params: { prompt: string }

actions.name: setHtml
actions.description: Set artifact HTML directly (no streaming). Only use for small edits or injecting pre-built HTML. Params: { html: string }

actions.name: getStatus
actions.description: Get current generation status (generating | ready | empty)

actions.name: setPrompt
actions.description: Set the prompt text without triggering generation. Params: { prompt: string }

actions.name: setSettings
actions.description: Update API settings. Params: { model?: string, baseUrl?: string, apiKey?: string }
